message:
refactor(browser): modularize client from 21.8k lines to 29 modules

Split monolithic lanceql.js into maintainable modules:

Client modules (29 files):
- cache/: MetadataCache, LRUCache, HotTierCache
- gpu/: Accelerator, Aggregator, Joiner, Sorter, Grouper, VectorSearch
- storage/: OPFS, LanceReader, LanceWriter, DatasetStorage
- sql/: Lexer, Parser, Executor, QueryPlanner
- lance/: LanceFile, RemoteFile, RemoteDataset, LanceData
- search/: IVFIndex
- database/: LanceDatabase, LocalDatabase, MemoryTable
- store/: Store, Vault
- wasm/: LanceQL WASM loader

Bundle sizes:
- dist/lanceql-worker.js: 172KB
- dist/lanceql.esm.js: 580KB
- dist/lanceql.js: 582KB

Tests: 10/10 suites pass, 181 e2e tests pass
